title: Custom card view
excerpt: Hello, in the calendar view, when you click on an item, you can see all the informations about this element. I’d like to be able to select some informations only, like in the Item Card. Is it possible? Thank you

posts.author: olivier.laurent (Olivier )
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, in the calendar view, when you click on an item, you can see all the informations about this element. I’d like to be able to select some informations only, like in the Item Card. Is it possible? Thank you

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you show what yours looks like when you click on the calendar item? For me, when I click on it, it goes to the ‘Item View’ and then I can see all the item views I’ve created
